description: Biweekly consulting retainer - next scheduled payment in a 6-month, 14-day-cadence series. A naive same-vendor/amount/month rule will flag this as a duplicate of the 2026-07-03 payment; it isn't - it's the next legitimate installment.
note: This is the Phase 3 false-positive test case: the raw flag SHOULD fire (is_duplicate=true is correct given the naive rule), but the Critic agent should dismiss it after reviewing the vendor's 6-month biweekly payment history, and the final verdict should be approve.
